programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Zoom in
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom in takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E11 - Royal Children Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E08 - Goodbyes
programme.desc: Papua New Guinea. Jim heads to one of the most dangerous places on the planet while Corey, choosing to stay behind, takes his horse on a lone hunt through the badlands where he grew up.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E17 - True Lies
programme.desc: A dude gets pulled over just outside of Billings because he was caught lying. Turns out he was breaking some game rules.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E18 - Head Case
programme.desc: Someone illegally shoots a trophy bull elk and hides its head. Wildlife officers spend months watching the area. When the head is finally moved, they use advanced technology to track it down and catch the person responsible.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E09 - Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E10 - Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike, it changes between day and night and is influenced from space and from Earth, The New satellites have been launched to study this zone.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S04:E01 - The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry
programme.desc: The guys put some scenes to the test from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S04:E02 - Equalizing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test 3 scenes from Denzel Washington's Equalizer films. Can Terry be as cool as Denzel and use propane tanks and a microwave to create an explosion, use a nail gun to take out the bad guy, or get a flash bang to ignite a room full of baking products?

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.desc: Someone illegally shoots a trophy bull elk and hides its head. Wildlife officers spend months watching the area. When the head is finally moved, they use advanced technology to track it down and catch the person responsible.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E09 - Darkness
programme.desc: Pakistan/Texas Pt2. Jim continues his hunt through extremely dangerous but also beautiful areas of Pakistan.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E19 - Blood Trail
programme.desc: Wardens step into the world of CSI, in determining where a deer was killed; when uncovering the truth, the best thing is to follow the blood trail.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E20 - Case Closed
programme.desc: The illegal killing of multiple animals over the past five years by a family of poachers is going to trial; wardens on the witness stand hope for a guilty verdict and a closed case.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E01 - The Cryoshere
programme.desc: The JAXA-ESA joint "BepiColombo" Mission is moments away from launch. The target is Mercury, which has been too long neglected by the world's space exploration programs. This mission will shed new light on this strange, tiny world.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E02 - Set Course for the Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA's Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe's Solar probe Mission. No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. The hope is to reveal the source of the solar winds that affect us here on Earth.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S04:E03 - Silencing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test ways of silencing a gun shot that they've seen in movies.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S04:E04 - Meet the Smiths
programme.desc: The guys put things to the test from the movie "Mr. and Mrs Smith"

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E12 - The New Royals
programme.desc: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie have gone through a lot of media attention and tough situations in their lives. From their parents' very public split to being targeted by the press, they've been through quite a bit. Despite all this, they remain dedicated to supporting the monarchy with their charity work. Through serving the Commonwealth, both sisters continue to make a positive impact.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E08 - Secret Trade
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates Africa's infamous poaching trade.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E11 - Naturally Distinctive
programme.desc: In this episode we visit places where people haven’t had it easy. Despite the hardships they experience daily, they choose to stay and shape their destiny. Bamiyan – a poverty stricken Afghan province, mercilessly tested by time. Niğde – a Turkish province with striking history. And Patagonia – the rough land at the very end of the world.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E12 - Naturally Refreshing
programme.desc: Thailand is one of the few countries in south-east Asia that has never been a European colony. Perhaps the word “thai” which means “free” has something to do with it. It is possibly the reason why this country evokes a certain magic that sets it apart from the surrounding countries. From Thailand we travel to Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E13 - The Best Of
programme.desc: Miracles of Nature has travelled to the four corners of the Earth - we look back over the astonishing range of destinations visited – each offering remarkable and stunning sights combined with dramatic histories and awe inspiring beauty.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E01 - Dangerous on Land
programme.desc: This episode offers an exciting look at nature with close-ups of wild cats, snakes, crocodiles, scorpions, etc., focusing on the animals' methods of defense or predation (venom, teeth, claws, size, etc.). In this episode you will learn all about the wild world of dangerous animals

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E06 - Montana Elk
programme.desc: Can Laramy survive the harsh conditions of elk country? With one misfire and a fresh blanket of snow on the mountains, the task of harvesting an elk for the winter is getting harder and harder.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E07 - Blacksmith Show
programme.desc: Forging one's own tools was a valuable skill for the mountain men. Laramy takes hammer to steel as he shows us how he crafts his own gear.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E08 - Idaho Elk
programme.desc: With a tag in pocket, Laramy takes to the mountains of Idaho on the hunt for the elusive elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E09 - Trapping Part 2
programme.desc: Winter trapping requires different skills than trapping in the spring. Laramy pulls out all the tricks to trap for critters.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E06 - Snakebite!
programme.desc: Manny is severely bitten by a large western diamondback rattlesnake while taping an episode of Savage Wild in south Texas.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E07 - Black Bear Encounter
programme.desc: Manny Puig experiences hair-raising encounters in the dead of night with massive Florida black bears. Florida is where animals that belong in the north woods come face to face with animals from the tropics and the bears here are confrontational.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S03:E01 - Python Invasion
programme.desc: Armed with only his wits, the most rudimentary tools and devices, and zero armour, predatory expert Manny Puig will guide you through some of the murkiest waters and most dangerous places on earth. In this episode Manny Puig is looking for giant snakes which have invaded the Everglades.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: Alaskan bush pilots risk everything to save hunters struggling to stay alive in a remote area of Kodiak.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: Island Air drops off a group of desperate hunters in the heart of the bush as a deep freeze hits Kodiak.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: Rough seas have a couple of surfers turning to Island Air for an adventure of a life time.

programme.desc: Are you ready to have dust devils, tornadoes, floods, and thunderstorms flashing before your eyes? You'd better be, because you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown, where we waste no time filling your screen with the most intense weather events caught on camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una bambina di sei anni è scappata e si è nascosta quando ha visto sua nonna picchiata a morte, ma l'uomo l'ha seguita, picchiata e aggredita. Ha detto che l'aggressore era suo zio, che è stato condannato. Anni dopo ha ritrattato la testimonianza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Jason MacLennan tornò a casa e trovò il corpo di suo padre Ken disteso in una pozza di sangue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks e il suo nascituro furono brutalmente uccisi. Il corpo venne scoperto dal fidanzato Keyon Pittman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una ragazza di 13 anni scomparve dalla sua casa in Colorado e l'unica prova che il rapitore aveva lasciato erano tre impronte digitali su una zanzariera.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima venne pugnalata più di cento volte, lasciando la sua camera da letto intrisa di sangue. Anche se il suo corpo era posizionato in modo suggestivo, non era stata violentata. È stato un crimine sessuale o è stato un atto di violenza casuale?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1984, il corpo dell'universitaria Laura Salmon fu trovato in una fattoria del Middle Tennessee, coperto dai suoi jeans e dai jeans dell'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fu uno dei casi più insoliti nella storia forense. Gli investigatori dovevano trovare un modo per risolvere un caso di omicidio con prove composte da un pomodoro schiacciato trovato sul luogo del delitto e piccoli riflessi di luce in una foto.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Quando un giovane vigile del fuoco morì per quella che sembrava essere una grave malattia cardiaca non diagnosticata, la sua famiglia e i suoi amici erano devastati ma non avevano prove del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Kathy Lorick fu assassinata su una pista da jogging di Concord, in California, in pieno giorno mentre parlava con suo marito al cellulare.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fu trovata morta nel suo appartamento a Bryan, in Texas, e le emorragie petecchiali nei suoi occhi indicavano che era stata strangolata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La mattina prima di Natale, una studentessa universitaria fu rapita dal parcheggio del suo appartamento.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1984, il corpo dell'universitaria Laura Salmon fu trovato in una fattoria del Middle Tennessee, coperto dai suoi jeans e dai jeans dell'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La polizia di Seattle non aveva sospetti per il brutale delitto della cantante post-grunge Mia Zapata. Passò più di un decennio prima che gli scienziati forensi potessero usare le prove raccolte da un sagace patologo per identificare l'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un chirurgo viene colpito a morte e il sospettato principale viene visto al ristorante al momento del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Il weekend del 4 luglio finisce in tragedia per una famiglia californiana. Per catturare l'assassino, i detective utilizzano una tecnica non ortodossa, analizzando frammenti di cimici, per poter mettere l'assassino dietro le sbarre.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi devono dimostrare al Chef Cracco di eccellere nella cucina regionale, con la sfida tra Milano e Roma nel ristorante. Devono preparare un menu Capitolino contro uno Milanese, rendendo omaggio ai piatti tipici senza deludere lo Chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco mette alla prova i cuochi testando le loro tecniche culinarie con due menu: uno crudo e uno cotto.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: In questo episodio di "Hell's Kitchen", Mara Maionchi e Frank Matano si uniscono alle squadre Rossa e Blu. Prima del servizio, i cuochi affrontano un esercizio di comunicazione: bendati o imbavagliati, devono replicare un piatto dello Chef Cracco.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: The Duke - Il Duca
programme.desc: Quando Hubert, il fedele compagno a quattro zampe del Duca di Dingwall, eredita le proprietà del Duca, fa squadra con la nipote del Maggiordomo per contrastare alcuni avidi parenti del caro estinto.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Air Buddies - Cuccioli Alla Riscossa
programme.desc: E' arrivata la nuova generazione del famoso franchise di successo Air Bud! Questa volta i protagonisti sono u cinque cuccioli di Air Bud, i Buddies, impegnati in una missione di salvataggio per salvare i loro genitori.

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Tontolone trova una strana pietra che gli permette di vedere nel futuro. Ma conoscere in anticipo cosa accadrà è fonte di un mare di guai! | Gargamella una ne pensa e cento ne fa! Questa volta ha scoperto il modo per influenzare i sogni dei Puffi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Cosa mai ci sarà dentro quella scatola abbandonata lungo la riva del fiume? Non apritela, Puffi, non apritela! Ma la curiosità è troppa e… | Finalmente Gargamella è convinto di aver trovato il modo di catturare i Puffi. Basta prendere il flauto magico e suonare una dolce melodia…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Grande Puffo dà a Puffo Debolino una crema speciale da indossare che gli restituirà la forza. | Armony, pur di avere successo, firma un contratto che lo imprigiona per sempre in un locale di fantasmi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Nella sua ricerca di qualcosa di nuovo, Puffo Vanitoso indossa un cappello magico creato da Gargamella che gli trasforma il viso in un disastro. | Puffo Burlone, Puffo Quattrocchi, Puffo Tontolone e Puffetta scoprono la clessidra del tempo in una caverna.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: A causa di un esperimento azzardato, Puffo Tontolone è in grado di immagazzinare una conoscenza infinita nella sua memoria. | Quando la casa di Puffo Quattrocchi brucia, si trasferisce dai suoi compagni Puffi; e uno ad uno lo cacciano a causa del suo intromettersi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Gargamella e Baldassarre comandano un robot gigante per costringere Re Gerardo a consegnare Puffo Meccanico. | Puffo Quattrocchi indossa il suo cappello da safari e vaga per la foresta per compiere buone azioni per gli animali.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Gargamella crea una Puffetta malvagia per attirare i Puffi nel suo castello. Ma il suo diabolico piano non va come dovrebbe e i Puffi avranno la meglio anche questa volta.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Quattrocchi approfitta dell'assenza di Grande Puffo per tentare di prendere il potere. | Puffo Burlone fa sempre talmente tanti scherzi che nessun Puffo gli crede quando cerca di metterli in guardia da Birda.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: L'Astropuffo costruisce un'astronave perché desidera volare nello spazio e conoscere nuovi mondi, ma l'astronave non parte. Grande Puffo, vedendolo così deluso, decide di organizzare per lui un fantastico "viaggio"…

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Chestnut - Un eroe a quattro zampe
programme.desc: Le giovani sorelle orfane Sal e Rae pensano di aver fatto centro quando trovano un adorabile cucciolo di alano il giorno stesso in cui vengono informate che saranno adottate... ma presto scopriranno che nel loro nuovo elegante appartamento a Manhattan i cani non sono ammessi.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: Air Bud 3
programme.desc: Quando Emma, la nuova ragazzina carina,si unisce alla squadra di calcio maschile, Josh e Buddy decidono che quest’anno si gioca a calcio. Come Josh ed Emma iniziano a conoscersi, Buddy e Molly, il cane di Emma, iniziano a incontrarsi fugacemente di notte.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Birba - Micio combinaguai
programme.desc: Un gatto di nome Oscar vive da tempo in un grattacielo in città con suo figlio Birba. Un giorno, incuriosito dal mondo esterno, Birba decide di uscire di casa ed avventurarsi alla ricerca di Miciolandia.

programme.title: The Last Warrior - La spada magica
programme.desc: La pace e la tranquillità si sono insediate a Belogoria. Il male è stato sconfitto e Ivan si sta godendo la meritata fama.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie

programme.desc: I Puffi trovano nel bosco un piccolo drago malato e lo portano al villaggio per curarlo. Gargamella, però, cattura il drago e decide di utilizzarlo contro i Puffi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi si incamminano verso la montagna della nebbia convinti che lì viva Puffo Stregone, ma una volta arrivati scoprono che ad aspettarli c'è Gargamella. | I Puffi trovano una strana bottiglia in cui vive un genio che esaudirà tre dei loro desideri se i Puffi sapranno dirgli la formula magica.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il fertilizzante che ha preparato Grande Puffo non funziona come dovrebbe e trasforma un uccellino in un terribile mostro…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffetta ritrova nel bosco il medaglione magico della strega Agata la quale chiede a Gargamella di aiutarla a cercare il prezioso gioiello.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Inventore vuole conquistare il cuore di Puffetta perciò le regala un paio di occhiali magici che rendono bello tutto ciò che si guarda… | Puffo Sognatore parte alla scoperta del mondo. Grande puffo gli regala un fischietto da utilizzare in caso di bisogno.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il Gigante Bue Grasso aiuta Gargamella a cercare il villaggio dei Puffi per cucinare un'appetitosa zuppa di Puffo.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Inventore crea un Puffo meccanico per aiutare i puffi nelle loro attività quotidiane. I Puffi sono molto contenti ma qualcosa va storto…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Pigrone sogna di trovarsi in un paradiso puffato in cui si può riposare senza dover svolfere tutti i lavori che Grande Puffo gli affida. | Quattrocchi organizza un viaggio in cima alla Montagna Ghiacciata per raccogliere il polline del Fior di Neve di cui Grande Puffo ha bisogno.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi scoprono una sorgente che hai il potere di ringiovanire chi ne beve l'acqua. Grande Puffo la beve e si trasforma in un piccolo Puffo che crea gran confusione nel villaggio…

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Discover how the Flying V revolutionized Rock and Metal. Featuring icons from Metallica, Megadeth, Slayer, and Judas Priest, this documentary explores the history and secrets behind the world’s most unique guitar and the legends who play it.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Discover the explosive origins of the San Francisco thrash scene. From garage rehearsals to the first club riots, see how bands like Metallica and Exodus ignited a global movement. It’s the raw, untold story of metal's birth.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: The saga continues as the Bay Area sound conquers the world. Witness the evolution from underground heroes to global icons through exclusive interviews and rare footage. Experience the peak of the thrash metal revolution

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: An essential piece of rock history. Since 1969, Wishbone Ash has taken their legendary twin-guitar sound across the globe. Witness this milestone 30th-anniversary performance captured live in London.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Beker on tour S36
programme.desc: Anatra, pesto e graukase - I nuovi episodi di Beker on tour grill edition partono dalle splendide colline del Friuli Venezia Giulia. Si torna alla genesi del mondo del BBQ, ovvero a sua maesta' il fuoco

programme.title: Parola di chef
programme.desc: Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficoltà, aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Il vino in pillole
programme.desc: I grandi vini spiegati da Giuseppe Carrus. I segreti per apprezzarne al meglio le caratteristiche organolettiche e i migliori abbinamenti

programme.title: Il gusto di Igles
programme.desc: S11 - La cucina circolare di Igles Corelli è una cucina zero sprechi. Ricette e consigli pratici per una sfruttare al massimo e senza sprechi gli ingredienti.

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Max cucina l'estate
programme.desc: S.1 - Le ricette di Max per l'estate. idee e consigli per piatti veloci, leggeri e gustosi.

programme.title: Giorgione orto e cucina
programme.desc: Pesaro, Urbino - Giorgione viaggia nelle Marche per fare incetta dei prodotti di questa terra. Curiosità, consigli e le immancabile ricette.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S10
programme.desc: Cannelloni ripieni di baccala' - Nella cucina della famiglia Bicocchi ci si diverte sempre. Tutte le maestranze della famiglia all’opera per preparare una ricetta molto gustosa. Buonissime crespelle ripiene di baccala'

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Gambero Rosso

programme.title: Beker on tour S36

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt gets down and dirty playing some beach Volleyball. In between bumps, sets, and spikes, the RG team serves up a smorgasbord of great food. The menu: Grilled Chicken Breast on Foccacia with Grilled Apples & Cambozola Cheese, Sezchuan Ribs with Chunky Plum Dipping Sauce, Roasted Corn and Pepper Potato Salad, and Homemade Protein Bars

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Mary Tang shows us some easy Chinese take-out dishes that are a true "wok" in the park! First, she rolls up some juicy wontons to douse in a bowl of hot seasoned chicken broth and delicious bok choy for a Chinese classic - Wonton Soup. Next, she gets out her frying pan for a crispy bowl of flavourful Chicken Chow Mein with egg noodles, savoury browned chicken, crunchy snow peas, and tasty baby corn. For an even simpler dish (and fan favourite), she then cooks up a hearty dish of Beef and Broccoli. Finally, Mary plays on different flavours with her Sweet and Sour Pork. Marinated pork cubes fried in a wonderful wok with fragrant garlic and ginger, sweet and tart red and green peppers,...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Noodles are a staple in Vietnamese cooking and host Lisa Nguyen showcases their versatility by starting off with fine vermicelli Stuffed Squid. Beautifully grilled and charred, these squid make great finger food. Lisa sticks to stuffing with her next dish - a Vietnamese favourite, Spring Rolls. Crunchy on the outside and filled with soft glass noodles, juicy ground pork, tender shrimp, and delectable crab meat on the inside, you're sure to be salivating at the sight of these tasty creations. Next on the menu, a Crispy Egg Noodle Pillow with a medley of vegetables and sauces on top. Lisa then finishes with a fun seafood and tomato soup; make sure you try the yummy shrimp and delightful...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Jasmin Ibrahim gives us the lowdown on her four favourite Lebanese dishes for a tasty meal. The best part? They all incorporate sweet and crunchy pomegranate! First, she makes a smoked eggplant dish - Baba Ghanouj. Then, she prepares a delicious Pastry with Pomegranate Sauce. These little half-moons, are filled with rich lamb, fresh mint, and toasted pine nuts, then paired with citrusy pomegranate molasses for a true balance of flavours. Next on the menu, Chicken with Pomegranate Sauce - a delightful blend of aromatic spices, sweet pomegranate molasses, and tender chicken breast. Enjoy with some fluffy rice and roasted vegetables for a delectable Sunday night dinner. Finally, Jasmin...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Joanna Chery elevates four Greek dishes using wine and spirits in this episode of One World Kitchen. First up, brown rice Stuffed Mussels infused with Greek dry white wine, tangy lemon juice, and fragrant spices - perfect for a sunny day by the sea. When evening rolls around, Joanna insists that red wine is a must! She makes a Sausage and Pepper Stew packed with golden-brown sausages and colourful bell peppers simmered in yummy tomatoes and a healthy dose of red wine. Then, she pulls out some brandy for a tender and delicious Beef Orzo Casserole. Finally, Joanna uses a traditional licorice-flavoured spirit called ouzo to bake a mouth-watering batch of Drunk Cookies.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts takes just 30 minutes to make classic food truck fare, without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a Southern-style feast for the whole family including Crunchy Coleslaw and Oven Barbeque Chicken all in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a delicious Greek feast in around 30 minutes, for under 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts prepares a quick and easy meal including Rustic Tuna Melts and Skillet S'mores, all under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Forget bicycle built for two. This Big Bike fits 30 people! Matt & the team join forces with the Heart & Stroke foundation to raise money by riding around a track. Matt feeds these 'bikers' some healthy and delicious grub. The menu: Grilled Calamari, Smoked Turkey Fajitas, Grilled Scallops and Watermelon Salsa, and Cold Gazpacho.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, a mushroom-brie tart! Next, tuna with grilled fennel-kale! Followed by classic spaghetti Carbonara! Finishing with a berry clafoutis!

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.desc: In this tasty episode of Spice Secrets, Jasmin and Shahir are back to spicing things up with everything from seed to bark to flower part! First up? A yummy French classic, the Croque Madame, gets a new twist with an aromatic Cinnamon Bechamel. Next, Potato Gnocchi gets some pep from poppy seeds, served in rich creamy sauce that's infused with aureate strands of sultry saffron. For a sweet finish, dessert finds an unusual friend in dill seed! A surprise pairing that works well thanks to science!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to make delightful breakfast treats like banana bread and hand pies filled with grape jelly.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: Up the Dish goes French cuisine with Poppy Sandler's classic Coq au Vin! Slow-cooked chicken in a luscious red wine sauce with pearl onions and mushrooms on the side? Yes please! Tiera Singh sticks with the tricolour theme and makes a Salad Lyonnaise - crispy bacon, poached eggs, and homemade croutons, with a red wine-bacon vinaigrette that steals the show. Missy Hui stays on the continent but skips la Republique; her Vincotto Mushrooms with Lentils uses an Italian wine to sauce up meaty oyster mushrooms and aromatic vegetables for a vegetarian twist. But Micah Trainor takes us right back to France - her Rabbit Rillettes with Champagne Gelee is white tablecloth worthy, with rabbit confit...

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.desc: Last things are first for this 'Upside Down' themed One Big Recipe featuring Montreal chef Kimberly Lallouz. Fruit and cheese to start? Why not? Check out her dessert wine poached Grilled Pears and Blue Cheese Salad. Next, Beef Tartare Sliders are spiked with horseradish aioli and served on warm brioche. Pasta follows, but in keeping with her topsy turvy theme, Korean flavour meets Italian savour in her Kimchi Pappardelle. Fish is next, Loup de Mer en Papillote with Ã‰crasé Potatoes is dressed up with shaved fennel and rich beurre rouge sauce. How do you end an inside-outside- upside-downside dinner? With the perfect starter! Check out Kim's Oyster Shooters with Champagne Granité for a...

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs make avocado toast and tacos, Liam whips up an easy pantry pasta, while Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make a favorite one pot meal!

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs prep rainbow fruit skewers, Liam whips up his charity-inspired cheeseburger soup, while Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make a popular Trinidadian street food, fried bread and saltfish!

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs make pancakes, Liam whips up craveable chicken coconut curry, Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make Nashville fried chicken sandwiches, and more!

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs test kitchen hacks with eggs, Liam whips up the beef and broccoli stir fry he made for friends as a kid, while Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make a beautiful pistachio pasta and Caesar salad!

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Jesse Magallanes was raised in an Argentinian household, but he knows there's more to his ancestry. Host Tyrone Edwards reveals the results of his DNA test and Jesse begins his journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.desc: In this tasty episode of Spice Secrets, Jasmin and Shahir are back to spicing things up with everything from seed to bark to flower part! First up? A yummy French classic, the Croque Madame, gets a new twist with an aromatic Cinnamon Bechamel. Next, Potato Gnocchi gets some pep from poppy seeds, served in rich creamy sauce that's infused with aureate strands of sultry saffron. For a sweet finish, dessert finds an unusual friend in dill seed! A surprise pairing that works well thanks to science!

programme.title: Flour Power

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: Up the Dish goes French cuisine with Poppy Sandler's classic Coq au Vin! Slow-cooked chicken in a luscious red wine sauce with pearl onions and mushrooms on the side? Yes please! Tiera Singh sticks with the tricolour theme and makes a Salad Lyonnaise - crispy bacon, poached eggs, and homemade croutons, with a red wine-bacon vinaigrette that steals the show. Missy Hui stays on the continent but skips la Republique; her Vincotto Mushrooms with Lentils uses an Italian wine to sauce up meaty oyster mushrooms and aromatic vegetables for a vegetarian twist. But Micah Trainor takes us right back to France - her Rabbit Rillettes with Champagne Gelee is white tablecloth worthy, with rabbit confit...

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.desc: Last things are first for this 'Upside Down' themed One Big Recipe featuring Montreal chef Kimberly Lallouz. Fruit and cheese to start? Why not? Check out her dessert wine poached Grilled Pears and Blue Cheese Salad. Next, Beef Tartare Sliders are spiked with horseradish aioli and served on warm brioche. Pasta follows, but in keeping with her topsy turvy theme, Korean flavour meets Italian savour in her Kimchi Pappardelle. Fish is next, Loup de Mer en Papillote with Ã‰crasé Potatoes is dressed up with shaved fennel and rich beurre rouge sauce. How do you end an inside-outside- upside-downside dinner? With the perfect starter! Check out Kim's Oyster Shooters with Champagne Granité for a...

programme.title: Dine Your Sign
programme.desc: On the Dine Your Sign Spring Special, Chef Siobhan Detkavich is cooking for Aries, Taurus, and Gemini! First, quiche with the season’s most delicious gifts – tender asparagus and earthy morels – suspended in silky custard and smothered in creamy fontina cheese! Next, spring lamb is stuffed with a sprightly pesto of mint and dandelion greens and roasted with shallots and new potatoes. Then, it’s an easy, healthy halibut dish with ramps (aka ‘wild garlic’) and grassy fiddleheads – the fish is steamed and finished with a sizzling pour over oil treatment that leaves the kitchen smelling like heaven! Finally, dessert a spring sign is sure to love: buttery, flaky croissant, stuffed with rich...

programme.title: Dine Your Sign
programme.desc: Chef Siobhan is all in for Gemini! She starts with a duo of appetizers as an homage to the sign of the twins: Yellow Beet Hummus and Mussels Escabeche. The next dish continues the theme of duality: Corn Two Ways! A creamy corn puree and a fried corn fritter! Next, a pizza for when you can't make up your mind. Half classic margherita, half gorgonzola, duck confit and pear. Finally, Geminis like chef Siobhan like to turn things on their heads, like her dessert of a Pineapple Upside-Down Cake!

programme.title: Moalboal White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Exploring the Basdaku Beach.

programme.title: Flying Over South Korea
programme.desc: The filmmaker showcases South Korea's natural wonders and urban landscapes by exploring the four of the country's most famous destinations: Jeju Island, Seoul, Geoje National Park and Busan.

programme.title: Turquoise Waters: Philippines
programme.desc: Cliffs overlooking turquoise waters.

programme.desc: Experience a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Beach of Australia
programme.desc: Australia's rugged beauty.

programme.title: A Day in Santorini
programme.desc: A visual journey through the coastal village of Oia, found on the far tip of Santorini Island.

programme.title: Iceland From Above
programme.desc: Trace the contours of Iceland's rugged landscape from a bird's eye view. Shaped by millions of years of volcanic activity, expect to see fjords, craters, canyons, and more.

programme.title: Redwood Forest Rain
programme.desc: A one-hour loop of falling rain, filmed in Mount Rainier National Park.

programme.title: Rushing Rocky Stream: Hawaii
programme.desc: Along the Pipiwai Trail, take an unforgettable walk through Hawaii's immense and picture-perfect bamboo forest.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: The relaxing vibe of a day at the beach, with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: Hawaii Sunrise Waves
programme.desc: Filmed along the eastern shores of Oahu, Hawaii; waves crash and glisten as the golden sun casts its warming rays.

programme.title: Thermal Wonderland: New Zealand
programme.desc: Free from rabbit holes but still full of magic, Waiotapu Thermal Wonderland has an impressive geothermal landscape.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 2
programme.desc: The beautiful Big Sur coast of California from a unique perspective.

programme.title: Ruby Beach Sunset
programme.desc: Relax for a full hour as a golden, soothing sunset slowly unfolds and turns to dusk as seen from Ruby Beach, on Washington state's Olympic Peninsula; you'll be lulled into a state of tranquil relaxation thanks to the sounds of rhythmic ocean waves gently crashing over the pebbly beach paired with the dazzling collage of four different sunset scenes shot in 4K.

programme.title: Lakeside Campfire
programme.desc: The beauty of a lakeside campfire.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise
programme.desc: Dive into an undersea world inhabited by the sea turtles; featuring real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for relaxation.

programme.title: Abel Tasman National Park
programme.desc: The lush coastal native bush of the Abel Tasman National Park in New Zealand.

programme.title: Patagonia Mountain Stream
programme.desc: A rejuvenating, refreshing window to the glacial meltwater springs of Chile's Torres Del Paine National Park in Patagonia with this 1-hour long fixed-angle nature relaxation video complete with stereo nature sounds of the creek and birds chirping.

programme.title: Rugged Coast: Newfoundland
programme.desc: The solidarity peacefulness of the Fort Point lighthouse on Newfoundland and Labrador's rugged coast.

programme.title: Tranquil Waters: Diablo River
programme.desc: A majestic view of the Diablo River which is surrounded by evergreen mountains.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 1
programme.desc: The sights and sounds of Big Sur, Calif.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hours long pure nature relaxation experience; immerse viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's pure and picturesque tropical islands -- for an entire day from sunrise to sunset.

programme.title: Above the Spanish Islands
programme.desc: Sweeping viewers on an aerial voyage over Mallorca and the Canary Islands.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The Wairere Falls of New Zealand.

programme.title: Blue Horizons
programme.desc: Featuring a diverse set of blue nature scenes from places like Hawaii, Mexico, Canada and California paired with a custom ambient track by Travis Revell.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Lazing the day away on a white sand beach in the Philippines as the sun gently sets on the horizon.

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast
programme.desc: An ambient nature film features the sights and sounds of the 11-mile Kalalau Trail on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.

programme.title: Superbloom Soaring
programme.desc: A gentle flight over the spring poppy fields of California's Antelope Valley and Lake Elsinore wilderness.

programme.title: Senaru Waterfalls: Indonesia
programme.desc: Discovering the beauty of waterfalls cascading from a sheer cliff, nestled in lush vegetation.

programme.title: Soothing Stream: Quebec
programme.desc: This morning, autumn shines its magical, golden light on the rushing waters of the Parc national de la Jacques-Cartier.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: East Bali
programme.desc: A serene soundtrack amidst a journey to spectacular beaches in Bali.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: East Bali
programme.desc: A serene soundtrack amidst a journey to spectacular beaches in Bali.

programme.title: Houhora Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: The seaside hamlet of Houhora, New Zealand; the beaches that make this destination unforgettable.

programme.title: Waimamaku Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring the remote, cliff-lined, cavernous coastline of Waimamaku Beach.

programme.title: Algarve: Portugal
programme.desc: Relax along the coastal cliffs in Portugal with this stunning 4K ambient nature film showcasing the stunning sandstone cliffs, glistening blue waters, peaceful waves and birds flying.

programme.title: Wenderholm & Scandretts Park: New Zealand
programme.desc: Scenery of scenic regional parks with their coastal forests and rocky bluffs that border spectacular ocean views.

programme.title: Tiny House by the Coast: Îles de la Madeleine
programme.desc: The filmmaker captures the beauty of a tiny lone house on Îles de la Madeleine, Quebec; the filmmaker illuminates the serenity and pristine environment of the region they belong to.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Beautiful Backcountry: Yukon River
programme.desc: The Yukon River snakes a path through the evergreen wilderness.

programme.title: Peaceful Forest Walk: Quebec
programme.desc: The heart of the Laurentians.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Tropical beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: A remote Indonesian island with breathtaking scenery of various beaches.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: MED DST MAKARSKA 15MIN
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: IL mare, essenza di una vita
programme.desc: Conductor, composer, cellist and writer, Roberto Soldatini was born in 1960 in Rome. He challenged himself by combining his two greatest passions: music and the sea. In fact, since 2011, he lives alone on Denecia, his sailing boat, alternating every year six months of navigation in the Mediterranean to six months moored in the port of Naples for wintering. Being the first Italian citizen to take up residence in a boat, creating a legal precedent on this matter, is certainly one of the major causes for which he has fought, and for which he still stands, by providing support to those like him who would like to set their lives in a floating house. However, nowadays the most compelling challenges for him are the inner ones. With the advent of the mid-life crisis, he felt the need to share with others, to seek harmony with nature and above all, to rediscover the essential. A man who seeks his inner peace and the evolution of his consciousness through a particular choice of life.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Memoirs 25th May
programme.desc: Memoirs 25th May

programme.title: Med Minds 06 Jean de Valette
programme.desc: Jean Parisot de Valette, the steadfast Grand Master of Malta, led the Knights with courage, defended his island, and saved Europe as we know it.

programme.title: Volcano Stories
programme.desc: Each of its tremors is constantly monitored : the Vesuvius is one of the world’s most famous and dangerous volcanoes. At its feet lies the city of Naples, the third largest city in Italy, and its 970,000 inhabitants.

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: Whats On Special and Unique Festivals
programme.desc: From Malta to Morocco, unique festivals capture Mediterranean creativity. Malta hosts the Valletta Green Festival, Notte Bianca, Malta Air Show, and Gharb International Kite and Wind Festival. Portugal celebrates with Festa das Cruzes, Morocco Dream City Festival dazzles with arts and music, Croatia brings the avant garde MoDem Festival, and Italy hosts the historic Venice Debutante Grand Ball. These festivals showcase the extraordinary, the festive, and the unforgettable.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.title: Origini
programme.desc: Valentina Caruso and Francesco Gasparri explore the Strait of Messina, where unique underwater currents create an oceanic ecosystem within the Mediterranean. Diver Domenico Majolino and marine biologist Simona Ratti explain its natural wonders, while Vincenzo Annuario tells the story of the Cariddi ferry, reborn after serving in the navy. At the National Archaeological Museum of Reggio Calabria, we discover the legacy of Magna Grecia and the famous Riace Bronzes. The 1908 earthquake that devastated Messina and Reggio Calabria is commemorated at the Regional Museum of Messina with the exhibition "1908 City Museum".

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Ease Anxiety with Movement
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: Malini Alexandria
programme.desc: Malini Angelica heads to Alexandria, Egypt’s Mediterranean city, exploring its blend of Greek, Roman, and Egyptian history. With a lively student scene, fresh seafood, and a relaxed seaside vibe, she discovers why Alexandria is an underrated, modern-feeling escape.

programme.title: Great Myths the Iliad
programme.desc: The Trojan war continues: Without Achilles the Greeks are losing ground and the wall protecting their ships is broken. Hera invents a ruse to make Zeus go to sleep allowing Poseidon to enter the fray.

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Concerto – OSN Gatti Bruckner Wagner Torino
programme.desc: In January 2022, Daniele Gatti conducted the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai at the Turin Auditorium, performing Wagner’s "Parsifal" excerpts and Bruckner’s Symphony No. 9. The programme highlighted Wagner's meditative Prelude to Act III and Good Friday Spell, followed by Bruckner’s profound Ninth Symphony, marked by its emotional depth and unfinished final movement.

programme.title: Med Nations 03 Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey, where cultures, continents, and centuries of history all come together. Turkey has a lot of different traditions, flavours, and history that have been shaped by powerful empires and cultural crossroads that have been around for hundreds of years. You can see this from the busy streets of Istanbul to the sunny Mediterranean coast.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: IL mare, essenza di una vita
programme.desc: Conductor, composer, cellist and writer, Roberto Soldatini was born in 1960 in Rome. He challenged himself by combining his two greatest passions: music and the sea. In fact, since 2011, he lives alone on Denecia, his sailing boat, alternating every year six months of navigation in the Mediterranean to six months moored in the port of Naples for wintering. Being the first Italian citizen to take up residence in a boat, creating a legal precedent on this matter, is certainly one of the major causes for which he has fought, and for which he still stands, by providing support to those like him who would like to set their lives in a floating house. However, nowadays the most compelling challenges for him are the inner ones. With the advent of the mid-life crisis, he felt the need to share with others, to seek harmony with nature and above all, to rediscover the essential. A man who seeks his inner peace and the evolution of his consciousness through a particular choice of life.

programme.title: La linea de la memoria
programme.desc: Rafael works in the port of Cádiz. He is a ship captain who spent many years sailing. His father was a historian and together they wrote a great book on the history of the port of Cádiz. Miguel is Rafael's friend since childhood. He is a big fan of sailing and travel around the world twice. The two protagonists are determined that the city of Cádiz recovers its glorious historical memory. Especially, the part concerning one of the most interesting episodes related to the Sea: the history of the Meridian of Cádiz (“zero Meridian”), valid for one hundred years in the eighteenth century for all the navigators of the world. Throughout the documentary, we know Rafael and Miguel and also their activities aimed at enhancing the history of the city. Finally, a group of students, in a very eye-catching action, “draw” with a red cloth the ancient meridian on the streets, squares and roofs of the city.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Montenegro
programme.desc: Malini explores Montenegro’s stunning landscapes, from the Bay of Kotor and its historic old town to the beaches of Sveti Stefan and Budva. programme.title: Backpack Serbia

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.
